headlines.description: — With the game tied after a lackluster first half, Mike Macdonald knew his team needed a spark.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rashid Shaheed returns kickoff 100 yards for TD and Seahawks blow away hapless Falcons 37-9

headlines.description: — Christian Benford apologized with a laugh, because the Buffalo Bills cornerback wasn’t supposed to jump when he instinctively leaped to snag Joe Burrow’s attempt to lob a pass over his head.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills rally for 39-34 win over Bengals thanks to Josh Allen's 4 TDs, Christian Benford's pick-6

headlines.description: — Cedric Gray isn't concerned about Tennessee Titans fans wanting the first overall NFL draft pick for the second straight year.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tony Pollard runs for 161 yards and 2 TDs as Titans outlast Shedeur Sanders and Browns 31-29

headlines.description: — The Minnesota Vikings had no bigger problem in this messy season than turnovers, with a league-worst minus-15 margin entering this week.
headlines.shortLinkText: McCarthy, Vikings rebound with 31-0 win over reeling Commanders, who lose Daniels to injury again

events.name: Miami Dolphins at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Tua Tagovailoa warmed up pretty quickly against the New York Jets and put his cold weather woes on ice.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tagovailoa wins in cold, leads Dolphins to 4th straight victory 34-10 to remain unbeaten vs. Jets

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Tyler Shough has faced the two top teams in the NFC South and beat them both on the road.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rookie QB Tyler Shough's 2 TD runs lead Saints to a 24-20 upset of Buccaneers

headlines.description: — The Jacksonville Jaguars are still reeling from the biggest collapse in franchise history.
headlines.shortLinkText: Daniel Jones hurt in Jaguars' 11th consecutive home win against the Colts, 36-19

headlines.description: — For a while now, Mike Tomlin and the Pittsburgh Steelers have walked the fine line between success and recriminations.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late reversal helps Steelers hold on for 27-22 win over Ravens and sole possession of division lead

events.name: Denver Broncos at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — This wasn't a typical Broncos game. For the first time this season, they didn't trail, and the final minutes were not overly stressful.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos beat Raiders 24-17 to extend winning streak to 10 games as Geno Smith injured

events.name: Chicago Bears at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Keisean Nixon couldn't have picked a better time to get his first interception of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Keisean Nixon has game-sealing INT and Packers overtake Bears for NFC North lead with 28-21 win

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Arizona Cardinals

headlines.description: — Matthew Stafford dominated on the field before being serenaded with “M-V-P!” chants off of it, soaking in some locker room praise from teammates after another stellar performance that led his Los Angeles Rams to a 45-17 win over the Arizona...
headlines.shortLinkText: Matthew Stafford and Puka Nacua help Rams stay tied atop NFC West with 45-17 win over Cardinals

events.name: Houston Texans at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Houston Texans never made their trip to Arrowhead Stadium on Sunday night into anything more than their next game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Texans stifle Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs in 20-10 victory to keep pace in AFC South race
